eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 06:17 PM ON MAY 9, 2026 Effective until 06:17 AM MAY 10, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the Amber Alert system. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. We have received important information regarding an infant abducted in Maricopa County. The Phoenix Police Department are looking for 5-day-old infant, white male, Ollie Olson. Last seen with suspect Tyler Olson, white male, Asia Wilson, white female, driving 2003 Black Jeep Liberty, Oregon License Plate 041HYB and is believed to be in danger. If located call 911 immediately. Authorities say the infant child was in company of Tyler Olson, white Male and Asia Wilson, White Female. Last seen driving 2003 Black Jeep Liberty bearing Oregon License Plate 41HYB. If you have any information on the where abouts of the child, please contact 911 immediately.
